---
title: "Regresi_Linear_Nonlinear"
author: "5052241006_Nabila Chesaria Octavia Putri"
date: "2026-04-19"
output: html_document
---
Model Regresi


Penaksir Parameter
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Data input
x <- c(5, 2, 12, 9, 15, 6, 25, 16)
y <- c(64, 87, 50, 71, 44, 56, 42, 60)

# Jumlah observasi
n <- length(y)

# Hitung rata-rata manual (tanpa mean())
xbar <- sum(x) / n
ybar <- sum(y) / n

# Inisialisasi akumulator
suma <- 0  # untuk numerator b1
sumb <- 0  # untuk denominator b1

# Hitung sum(xi - xbar)(yi - ybar) dan sum(xi - xbar)^2
for (i in 1:n) {
  suma <- suma + (x[i] - xbar) * (y[i] - ybar)  # kovarian X dan Y
  sumb <- sumb + (x[i] - xbar)^2                 # variansi X
}

# Estimasi koefisien
b1 <- suma / sumb        # slope
b0 <- ybar - b1 * xbar  # intercept

# Tampilkan hasil
cat("b0 (intercept):", b0, "\n")
cat("b1 (slope)    :", b1, "\n")
cat("Model: Y_hat =", b0, "+", b1, "* X\n")
```

Prediksi dan Residual
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Inisialisasi vektor
ytopi <- numeric(n)  # nilai prediksi
resid  <- numeric(n) # residual

for (i in 1:n) {
  ytopi[i] <- b0 + b1 * x[i]        # prediksi Y ke-i
  resid[i]  <- y[i] - ytopi[i]      # residual ke-i
}

# Tampilkan tabel prediksi
hasil <- data.frame(
  X       = x,
  Y_aktual = y,
  Y_prediksi = round(ytopi, 4),
  Residual   = round(resid, 4)
)
print(hasil)
```

Dekomposisi Sum of Squares
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
ssr <- 0  # sum of squares regression
sse <- 0  # sum of squares error

for (i in 1:n) {
  ssr <- ssr + (ytopi[i] - ybar)^2  # deviasi prediksi dari rata-rata Y
  sse <- sse + (y[i] - ytopi[i])^2  # deviasi aktual dari prediksi
}

sst <- ssr + sse  # total sum of squares

# Degrees of freedom
dfr <- 1      # regresi: jumlah prediktor
dfe <- n - 2  # error: n dikurangi jumlah parameter (b0 dan b1)
dft <- n - 1  # total

# Mean squares
msr <- ssr / dfr  # mean square regression
mse <- sse / dfe  # mean square error

cat("SSR:", ssr, "\nSSE:", sse, "\nSST:", sst, "\n")
cat("MSR:", msr, "\nMSE:", mse, "\n")
```

Koefisien Determinasi R2
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rsq  <- ssr / sst                             # R-squared
radj <- rsq - (dfr * (1 - rsq)) / (n - dfr - 1)  # R-squared adjusted

cat("R-squared         :", round(rsq, 4), "\n")
cat("R-squared Adjusted:", round(radj, 4), "\n")
```

Uji Serentak
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
alpha <- 0.05  # tingkat signifikansi

# Hitung F hitung
fhit <- msr / mse

# F tabel dari distribusi F
ftab <- qf(1 - alpha, dfr, dfe)

# Hitung p-value
pvalf <- round(1 - pf(fhit, dfr, dfe), 4)

# Keputusan
if (fhit > ftab) {
  tandaf <- ">"
  kep    <- "Tolak H0"
} else {
  tandaf <- "<"
  kep    <- "Gagal Tolak H0"
}

# Tabel ANOVA
source_col <- c("Regression", "Residual", "Total")
df_col     <- c(dfr, dfe, dft)
ss_col     <- c(ssr, sse, sst)
ms_col     <- c(msr, mse, NA)
fh_col     <- c(fhit, NA, NA)
ft_col     <- c(ftab, NA, NA)
pv_col     <- c(pvalf, NA, NA)

tabel_anova <- data.frame(
  Source    = source_col,
  df        = df_col,
  SS        = round(ss_col, 4),
  MS        = round(ms_col, 4),
  F_hitung  = round(fh_col, 4),
  F_tabel   = round(ft_col, 4),
  p_value   = pv_col
)

print(tabel_anova)
cat("\nKesimpulan: F hitung", tandaf, "F tabel →", kep, "\n")
```

Uji Parsial
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Hitung sum xi^2 dan sum (xi - xbar)^2 secara manual
sumb0 <- 0  # untuk s(b0): sum xi^2
sumb1 <- 0  # untuk s(b1): sum (xi - xbar)^2

for (i in 1:n) {
  sumb0 <- sumb0 + x[i]^2               # jumlah kuadrat xi
  sumb1 <- sumb1 + (x[i] - xbar)^2     # jumlah kuadrat deviasi xi
}

# Standard error koefisien
seb0 <- sqrt(mse * sumb0 / (n * sumb1))  # standard error b0
seb1 <- sqrt(mse / sumb1)                # standard error b1

# t hitung
thit0 <- b0 / seb0  # t hitung untuk intercept
thit1 <- b1 / seb1  # t hitung untuk koefisien

# t tabel (dua arah)
ttab <- qt(1 - alpha / 2, dfe)

# Hitung p-value (dua arah)
pval0 <- if (thit0 < 0) 2 * pt(thit0, dfe) else 2 * (1 - pt(thit0, dfe))
pval1 <- if (thit1 < 0) 2 * pt(thit1, dfe) else 2 * (1 - pt(thit1, dfe))

# Keputusan
kept0 <- if (pval0 <= alpha) "Tolak H0" else "Gagal Tolak H0"
kept1 <- if (pval1 <= alpha) "Tolak H0" else "Gagal Tolak H0"

# Tabel parsial
tabel_parsial <- data.frame(
  Variabel      = c("Intercept (b0)", "X (b1)"),
  Coefficient   = round(c(b0, b1), 4),
  Std_Error     = round(c(seb0, seb1), 4),
  T_hitung      = round(c(thit0, thit1), 4),
  T_tabel       = round(c(ttab, ttab), 4),
  p_value       = round(c(pval0, pval1), 4),
  Keputusan     = c(kept0, kept1)
)

print(tabel_parsial)
```

Confodence Interfal Parameter
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Margin CI
ci0 <- ttab * seb0  # margin error b0
ci1 <- ttab * seb1  # margin error b1

cat("Confidence Interval (95%) untuk setiap parameter:\n")
cat("β0: (", round(b0 - ci0, 4), ",", round(b0 + ci0, 4), ")\n")
cat("β1: (", round(b1 - ci1, 4), ",", round(b1 + ci1, 4), ")\n")
```

Regresi Linear Sederhana
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rls <- function(y, x) {

  # Persiapan
  n    <- length(y)
  xbar <- sum(x) / n  # rata-rata x
  ybar <- sum(y) / n  # rata-rata y

  # Penaksir parameter
  suma <- 0
  sumb <- 0
  for (i in 1:n) {
    suma <- suma + (x[i] - xbar) * (y[i] - ybar)  # numerator b1
    sumb <- sumb + (x[i] - xbar)^2                 # denominator b1
  }

  b1 <- suma / sumb        # slope
  b0 <- ybar - b1 * xbar  # intercept

  # Prediksi dan sum of squares
  ytopi <- numeric(n)
  ssr   <- 0
  sse   <- 0
  for (i in 1:n) {
    ytopi[i] <- b0 + b1 * x[i]            # nilai prediksi
    ssr      <- ssr + (ytopi[i] - ybar)^2 # sum squares regression
    sse      <- sse + (y[i] - ytopi[i])^2 # sum squares error
  }

  sst <- ssr + sse  # sum squares total

  # Degrees of freedom dan mean squares
  dfr <- 1
  dfe <- n - 2
  dft <- n - 1
  msr <- ssr / dfr
  mse <- sse / dfe

  # R-squared
  rsq  <- ssr / sst
  radj <- rsq - (dfr * (1 - rsq)) / (n - dfr - 1)

  # Uji serentak (uji F)
  alpha <- 0.05
  fhit  <- msr / mse
  ftab  <- qf(1 - alpha, dfr, dfe)
  pvalf <- round(1 - pf(fhit, dfr, dfe), 4)

  if (fhit > ftab) {
    tandaf <- ">"
    kepf   <- "Tolak H0"
  } else {
    tandaf <- "<"
    kepf   <- "Gagal Tolak H0"
  }

  # Uji parsial (uji t)
  sumb0 <- 0
  sumb1 <- 0
  for (i in 1:n) {
    sumb0 <- sumb0 + x[i]^2           # sum xi^2
    sumb1 <- sumb1 + (x[i] - xbar)^2 # sum (xi - xbar)^2
  }

  seb0  <- sqrt(mse * sumb0 / (n * sumb1)) # standard error b0
  seb1  <- sqrt(mse / sumb1)               # standard error b1
  thit0 <- b0 / seb0                       # t hitung b0
  thit1 <- b1 / seb1                       # t hitung b1
  ttab  <- qt(1 - alpha / 2, dfe)          # t tabel

  pval0 <- if (thit0 < 0) 2 * pt(thit0, dfe) else 2 * (1 - pt(thit0, dfe))
  pval1 <- if (thit1 < 0) 2 * pt(thit1, dfe) else 2 * (1 - pt(thit1, dfe))

  kept0 <- if (pval0 <= alpha) "Tolak H0" else "Gagal Tolak H0"
  kept1 <- if (pval1 <= alpha) "Tolak H0" else "Gagal Tolak H0"

  # Confidence interval
  ci0 <- ttab * seb0
  ci1 <- ttab * seb1

  # Output
  cat("Dari pengujian regresi linear sederhana, diperoleh output berikut:\n")
  cat("Model : Y_hat =", round(b0, 4), "+", round(b1, 4), "* X\n\n")

  print(data.frame(
    Variabel = c("R-squared", "R-squared Adjusted", "Observations"),
    Nilai    = c(round(rsq, 4), round(radj, 4), n)
  ), row.names = FALSE)

  cat("\nUji Serentak | H0 : b1 = 0\n")
  print(data.frame(
    Source   = c("Regression", "Residual", "Total"),
    df       = c(dfr, dfe, dft),
    SS       = round(c(ssr, sse, sst), 4),
    MS       = round(c(msr, mse, NA), 4),
    F_hitung = round(c(fhit, NA, NA), 4),
    F_tabel  = round(c(ftab, NA, NA), 4),
    p_value  = c(pvalf, NA, NA)
  ), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("Kesimpulan : F hitung", tandaf, "F tabel ->", kepf, "\n")

  cat("\nUji Parsial | H0 : bi = 0\n")
  print(data.frame(
    Variabel    = c("Intercept (b0)", "X (b1)"),
    Coefficient = round(c(b0, b1), 4),
    Std_Error   = round(c(seb0, seb1), 4),
    T_hitung    = round(c(thit0, thit1), 4),
    T_tabel     = round(c(ttab, ttab), 4),
    p_value     = round(c(pval0, pval1), 4),
    Keputusan   = c(kept0, kept1)
  ), row.names = FALSE)

  cat("\nConfidence Interval (95%):\n")
  cat("b0 : (", round(b0 - ci0, 4), ",", round(b0 + ci0, 4), ")\n")
  cat("b1 : (", round(b1 - ci1, 4), ",", round(b1 + ci1, 4), ")\n")
}

# Cara pakai
x <- c(5, 2, 12, 9, 15, 6, 25, 16)
y <- c(64, 87, 50, 71, 44, 56, 42, 60)
rls(y, x)
```

Regresi Linear Berganda
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
regan <- function(y, x) {

  # Persiapan matriks
  Y <- as.matrix(y)
  X <- as.matrix(cbind(1, x))  # tambah kolom 1 untuk intercept
  n <- dim(X)[1]               # jumlah observasi
  k <- dim(X)[2]               # jumlah kolom (termasuk intercept)

  # Estimasi parameter: b = (X'X)^-1 X'Y
  xtx <- solve(t(X) %*% X)  # invers dari (X'X)
  xty <- t(X) %*% Y          # X'Y
  b   <- xtx %*% xty          # vektor koefisien

  # Prediksi dan rata-rata Y
  ytopi <- X %*% b            # nilai prediksi Y
  ybar  <- sum(y) / n         # rata-rata Y (manual)

  # Sum of squares menggunakan formula matriks
  ssr <- as.numeric(t(b) %*% xty - n * ybar^2)  # SSR = b'(X'Y) - n*ybar^2
  sse <- as.numeric(t(Y) %*% Y - t(b) %*% xty)  # SSE = Y'Y - b'(X'Y)
  sst <- ssr + sse                                # SST = SSR + SSE

  # Degrees of freedom dan mean squares
  dfr <- k - 1      # df regresi: jumlah prediktor (tanpa intercept)
  dfe <- n - k      # df error: n dikurangi jumlah parameter
  dft <- dfr + dfe  # df total
  msr <- ssr / dfr  # mean square regression
  mse <- sse / dfe  # mean square error

  # Koefisien determinasi
  rsq  <- ssr / sst
  radj <- rsq - (dfr * (1 - rsq)) / (n - dfr - 1)

  # Uji serentak (uji F)
  alpha <- 0.05
  fhit  <- msr / mse                        # F hitung
  ftab  <- qf(1 - alpha, dfr, dfe)          # F tabel
  pvalf <- round(1 - pf(fhit, dfr, dfe), 4) # p-value

  if (fhit > ftab) {
    tandaf <- ">"
    kepf   <- "Tolak H0"
  } else {
    tandaf <- "<"
    kepf   <- "Gagal Tolak H0"
  }

  # Uji parsial (uji t)
  sb   <- sqrt(mse) * sqrt(diag(xtx))  # standard error tiap koefisien
  thit <- as.vector(b) / sb             # t hitung tiap koefisien
  ttab <- qt(1 - alpha / 2, dfe)        # t tabel (dua arah)

  pval_t   <- numeric(k)
  kept     <- character(k)
  ci_lower <- numeric(k)  # batas bawah CI
  ci_upper <- numeric(k)  # batas atas CI

  for (i in 1:k) {
    pval_t[i]   <- if (thit[i] < 0) 2 * pt(thit[i], dfe) else 2 * (1 - pt(thit[i], dfe))
    kept[i]     <- if (pval_t[i] <= alpha) "Tolak H0" else "Gagal Tolak H0"
    ci_lower[i] <- as.vector(b)[i] - ttab * sb[i]  # batas bawah
    ci_upper[i] <- as.vector(b)[i] + ttab * sb[i]  # batas atas
  }

  # Nama variabel otomatis
  var_names <- c("Intercept", paste0("X", 1:(k - 1)))

  # Output
  cat("Dari pengujian regresi linear berganda, diperoleh output berikut:\n\n")

  print(data.frame(
    Variabel = c("R-squared", "R-squared Adjusted", "Observations"),
    Nilai    = c(round(rsq, 4), round(radj, 4), n)
  ), row.names = FALSE)

  cat("\nUji Serentak | H0 : b1 = b2 = ... = bk = 0\n")
  print(data.frame(
    Source   = c("Regression", "Residual", "Total"),
    df       = c(dfr, dfe, dft),
    SS       = round(c(ssr, sse, sst), 4),
    MS       = round(c(msr, mse, NA), 4),
    F_hitung = round(c(fhit, NA, NA), 4),
    F_tabel  = round(c(ftab, NA, NA), 4),
    p_value  = c(pvalf, NA, NA)
  ), row.names = FALSE)
  cat("Kesimpulan : F hitung", tandaf, "F tabel ->", kepf, "\n")

  cat("\nUji Parsial | H0 : bi = 0\n")
  print(data.frame(
    Variabel    = var_names,
    Coefficient = round(as.vector(b), 4),
    Std_Error   = round(sb, 4),
    T_hitung    = round(thit, 4),
    T_tabel     = round(rep(ttab, k), 4),
    p_value     = round(pval_t, 4),
    Keputusan   = kept
  ), row.names = FALSE)

  cat("\nConfidence Interval (95%):\n")
  for (i in 1:k) {
    cat(var_names[i], ": (", round(ci_lower[i], 4), ",", round(ci_upper[i], 4), ")\n")
  }
}

# Cara pakai
x1 <- c(1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10)
x2 <- c(80, 75, 70, 65, 60, 85, 78, 72, 68, 55)
y  <- c(30, 35, 40, 45, 50, 32, 38, 43, 48, 55)
regan(y, cbind(x1, x2))
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```

Model Eksponensial
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# --- MODEL EKSPONENSIAL ---
x <- c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5)
y <- c(2.7, 7.4, 20.1, 54.6, 148.4)   # Data yang diduga eksponensial

n <- length(x)

# --- LINEARISASI: Y* = ln(Y) ---
y_star <- log(y)               # ln(Y), transformasi logaritma natural

# --- HITUNG PARAMETER PADA MODEL TERLINEARKAN ---
sum_x    <- sum(x)
sum_ys   <- sum(y_star)
sum_xys  <- sum(x * y_star)
sum_x2   <- sum(x^2)

x_bar  <- sum_x / n
ys_bar <- sum_ys / n

Sxy_star <- sum_xys - n * x_bar * ys_bar
Sxx      <- sum_x2  - n * x_bar^2

# Koefisien model linearkan
b1_star <- Sxy_star / Sxx              # = beta_1 asli
b0_star <- ys_bar - b1_star * x_bar   # = ln(beta_0)

# Konversi balik intercept
beta0 <- exp(b0_star)                  # beta_0 asli

cat("Parameter Model Eksponensial:\n")
cat("beta_0 =", beta0, "\n")
cat("beta_1 =", b1_star, "\n")
cat("Model: Y = ", round(beta0, 3), "* exp(", round(b1_star, 3), "* X)\n")

# --- PREDIKSI (dalam skala asli) ---
y_hat_star <- b0_star + b1_star * x    # Prediksi pada skala ln
y_hat      <- exp(y_hat_star)          # Konversi balik ke skala asli

# --- EVALUASI MODEL ---
SSE_star <- sum((y_star - y_hat_star)^2)  # SSE pada skala terlinearkan
SST_star <- sum((y_star - ys_bar)^2)
R2_star  <- 1 - SSE_star / SST_star

cat("R^2 (skala ln) =", R2_star, "\n")
```

Model Polinomial
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# --- MODEL POLINOMIAL ORDE-2 ---
x  <- c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)
y  <- c(2, 5, 9, 11, 10, 7, 3)    # Pola kurva terbalik (kuadratik)
n  <- length(x)

# --- BUAT VARIABEL X^2 ---
x2 <- x^2                           # Prediktor baru: X kuadrat

# --- SUSUN MATRIKS DESAIN ---
ones <- rep(1, n)
X    <- matrix(c(ones, x, x2), nrow = n)   # Matriks n x 3

cat("Matriks Desain X:\n")
print(X)

# --- ESTIMASI PARAMETER OLS ---
Y_vec    <- matrix(y, nrow = n)
XtX      <- t(X) %*% X
XtY      <- t(X) %*% Y_vec
XtX_inv  <- solve(XtX)
beta_hat <- XtX_inv %*% XtY

b0 <- beta_hat[1]
b1 <- beta_hat[2]
b2 <- beta_hat[3]

cat("\nParameter model kuadratik:\n")
cat("b0 =", b0, "\n")
cat("b1 =", b1, "\n")
cat("b2 =", b2, "\n")
cat("Model: Y =", round(b0,3), "+", round(b1,3), "X +", round(b2,3), "X^2\n")

# --- PREDIKSI DAN EVALUASI ---
Y_hat    <- X %*% beta_hat
residual <- Y_vec - Y_hat

y_bar <- sum(y) / n
SST   <- sum((y - y_bar)^2)
SSE   <- sum(residual^2)
SSR   <- SST - SSE

dfr <- 2         # Orde polinomial
dfe <- n - dfr - 1

MSR <- SSR / dfr
MSE <- SSE / dfe
R2  <- SSR / SST

cat("\nSST =", SST, "| SSR =", as.numeric(SSR), "| SSE =", as.numeric(SSE))
cat("\nR^2 =", as.numeric(R2), "\n")

# --- UJI F ---
alpha   <- 0.05
F_hit   <- as.numeric(MSR / MSE)
F_tab   <- qf(1 - alpha, dfr, dfe)
cat("F hitung =", F_hit, "| F tabel =", F_tab, "\n")
cat(ifelse(F_hit > F_tab, "Model signifikan\n", "Model tidak signifikan\n"))

# --- VERTEX (titik puncak/minimum kurva) ---
x_vertex <- -b1 / (2 * b2)
y_vertex <- b0 + b1*x_vertex + b2*x_vertex^2
cat("Titik puncak kurva: X =", x_vertex, ", Y =", y_vertex, "\n")
```

Model Logaritmik
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# --- MODEL LOGARITMIK ---
x <- c(1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 32)
y <- c(0, 3.5, 7.0, 10.5, 14.0, 17.5)   # Pola melambat seiring X naik

n <- length(x)

# --- TRANSFORMASI: X* = ln(X) ---
x_star <- log(x)              # Prediktor baru: ln(X)

# --- HITUNG PARAMETER (OLS pada X* dan Y) ---
sum_xs  <- sum(x_star)
sum_y   <- sum(y)
sum_xsy <- sum(x_star * y)
sum_xs2 <- sum(x_star^2)

xs_bar <- sum_xs / n
y_bar  <- sum_y  / n

Sxy_log <- sum_xsy - n * xs_bar * y_bar
Sxx_log <- sum_xs2  - n * xs_bar^2

b1_log <- Sxy_log / Sxx_log
b0_log <- y_bar - b1_log * xs_bar

cat("Parameter model logaritmik:\n")
cat("b0 =", b0_log, "\n")
cat("b1 =", b1_log, "\n")
cat("Model: Y =", round(b0_log, 3), "+", round(b1_log, 3), "* ln(X)\n")

# --- PREDIKSI DAN EVALUASI ---
y_hat <- b0_log + b1_log * x_star
SSE   <- sum((y - y_hat)^2)
SST   <- sum((y - y_bar)^2)
R2    <- 1 - SSE / SST

cat("R^2 =", R2, "\n")
```

Perbandingan model
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# --- BANDINGKAN SSE BEBERAPA MODEL ---
# Misalkan kita punya SSE dari 3 model
SSE_linear <- 45.2
SSE_eksponen <- 12.8
SSE_polinomial <- 9.1

models <- c("Linear", "Eksponensial", "Polinomial Orde-2")
sses   <- c(SSE_linear, SSE_eksponen, SSE_polinomial)

cat("=== Perbandingan SSE Antar Model ===\n")
for (i in 1:length(models)) {
  cat(sprintf("%-25s SSE = %.4f\n", models[i], sses[i]))
}
cat("\nModel terbaik (SSE terkecil):", models[which.min(sses)], "\n")
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}

```
